digital_assets.name: eLitigation (Judgments Portal)
digital_assets.description: Official portal for Supreme Court judgments and case law

digital_assets.name: Singapore Law Watch
digital_assets.description: Legal news, judgments, and case summaries aggregator maintained by SAL

key_people.name: Sundaresh Menon
key_people.title: Chief Justice
key_people.title_description: Presiding member of the Supreme Court and President of the Court of Appeal; highest judicial office in Singapore
key_people.description: Appointed Chief Justice on 6 November 2012. First Chief Justice born in Singapore.

departments.name: Court of Appeal
departments.head: Chief Justice Sundaresh Menon
departments.description: Highest court in Singapore, hearing civil and criminal appeals from the High Court. Comprises the Chief Justice and Justices of Appeal.

departments.name: Appellate Division of the High Court
departments.description: Intermediate appellate court hearing appeals from the General Division of the High Court. Comprises 4 Judges.

departments.name: General Division of the High Court
departments.description: Court of first instance for serious criminal cases and high-value civil cases. Also hears appeals from State Courts and Family Justice Courts. Comprises 19 Judges and Judicial Commissioners.

departments.name: Singapore International Commercial Court (SICC)
departments.description: Specialist court for international commercial disputes, with International Judges and expertise in cross-border commercial law.

recent_events.title: Appointment of two new High Court Judges
recent_events.description: PMO announced appointment of two new Judges of the High Court, bringing total Supreme Court judicial strength to 35 Judges plus 26 International Judges.
recent_events.impact: Expanded capacity of the General Division of the High Court

recent_events.title: Appointment of Supreme Court and SICC International Judges
recent_events.description: Appointment of Justice David John Goddard as International Judge of the Court of Appeal and other SICC appointments.
recent_events.impact: Strengthened international judicial expertise in commercial and appellate matters

recent_events.title: Three Judicial Commissioners appointed as High Court Judges
recent_events.description: Three existing Judicial Commissioners elevated to Judges of the High Court, including Justice Kristy Tan.
recent_events.impact: Increased High Court capacity from 17 to 19 Judges

recent_events.title: Ang Cheng Hock appointed as Judge of the High Court
recent_events.description: Distinguished legal professional with 29 years of experience appointed as High Court Judge.
recent_events.impact: Supreme Court expanded to 36 Judges total

recent_events.title: Court of Appeal landmark ruling on Terraform Labs crypto collapse
recent_events.description: Singapore Court of Appeal largely upheld a landmark ruling against Terraform Labs and its owner regarding the 2022 collapse of TerraUSD and Luna cryptocurrencies, while finding the trial court erred in damages calculation.
recent_events.impact: Significant precedent for cryptocurrency and digital asset disputes

related_entities.org_description: Supreme Court is a constitutional organ of the Singapore government, operating independently under Article 93 of the Constitution
Subordinate courts hearing less serious criminal cases and lower-value civil claims; appeals go to the High Court
Specialist courts for family proceedings; appeals go to the High Court

core_business:
新加坡最高法院（Supreme Court of Singapore）是新加坡司法体系的最高审级，成立于1970年1月9日，由上诉庭（Court of Appeal）、高等法庭上诉庭（Appellate Division of the High Court）和高等法庭一般分庭（General Division of the High Court）三部分组成。上诉庭是新加坡的终审法院，审理来自高等法庭的民事和刑事上诉案件。高等法庭一般分庭则是一审法院，负责审理严重刑事案件和高额民事纠纷，并受理来自国家法院（State Courts）和家事司法法院（Family Justice Courts）的上诉。

最高法院还设有新加坡国际商事法庭（Singapore International Commercial Court，简称SICC），专门处理国际商事争议，配备来自世界各地的国际法官（International Judges），在国际商事法领域具有显著优势。截至2026年3月，最高法院共有35名法官（包括首席大法官1名、上诉庭法官5名、高等法庭上诉庭法官4名、高等法庭法官19名、司法委员1名及高级法官5名）以及26名国际法官。2026年3月新任命两名高等法庭法官，进一步增强了审判力量。

现任首席大法官为梅达顺（Sundaresh Menon），2012年11月6日就任，是首位在新加坡出生的首席大法官。最高法院法官由总统根据总理建议任命。2026年3月，上诉庭对Terraform Labs加密货币崩溃案作出里程碑式裁决，确立了数字资产争议领域的重要先例。新加坡最高法院积极推动法治建设和司法合作，SICC已成为亚太地区国际商事争议解决的枢纽，首席大法官梅达顺多次在国际论坛上倡导跨境司法合作。
apec_stance: Singapore actively promotes the rule of law and judicial cooperation within APEC. The SICC serves as a hub for international commercial dispute resolution in the Asia-Pacific region, and Singapore Courts engage in judicial exchange programs with other APEC member economies. Chief Justice Menon has spoken at international forums on cross-border legal cooperation and the role of courts in supporting international trade.

collection_meta.notes: Enriched with Wikipedia full text + DBpedia (score: 100)
